policies.policyName: Deny all activities for users with readonly tag
policies.notes: Explicit deny-all guardrail for a basic/read-only tag: blocks every activity type for anyone with this tag, regardless of any other allow policy that might apply to them (EFFECT_DENY always wins). Queries (list_*/get_*) are not gated by policies at all, so tagged users can still browse the org, wallets, policies, etc. via the dashboard or API -- this only blocks state-changing activities.
